PRC_MEDICARE Prostate Cancer - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS

1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
PRC_COMBINED_EVER Prostate Cancer - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
PRC_MEDICARE_EVER Prostate Cancer - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever
